name: Google Classroom
description: Access student courses, assignments, and announcements from Google Classroom. Use when the student wants to see their classes, check assignments, view due dates, or review announcements from their teachers.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List the student's enrolled courses. Use when the student asks about their classes or what courses they're in.

tools.name: list_assignments
tools.description: List assignments/coursework for a specific course. Use when the student asks about homework, assignments, or what's due.

courseId.description: The Google Classroom course ID (get from list_courses first)

tools.name: list_announcements
tools.description: List recent announcements from a course. Use when the student asks what their teacher said or about class updates.

tools.name: get_auth_status
tools.description: Check if the student has connected their Google Classroom account.
